analysis.primary_subject: Kitchen cabinetry and countertop installation with visible construction elements and unfinished surfaces

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - The alignment of the cabinets and countertop appears reasonably accurate, though some gaps and misalignments are visible.
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - The surfaces show some imperfections and unfinished areas, indicating ongoing work.
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Medium - Basic installation is evident, but finishing touches and fine details are still pending.

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image captures the ongoing installation of modern kitchen cabinetry and countertops. The focus is on the assembly stage, showcasing the modular design and initial setup before final touches and finishing.
